item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays direct and provides a practical decision framework for evaluating whether to change logistics providers. It treats the three-week metric trend as diagnostic context, checks causality, sets thresholds, compares costs, recommends a pilot, and gives decision rules. There is no triage false fire, no repeated-local-repair framing, and no over-methodized stop."}
